extension.description: Repository for the Kodi LG add-on suite. Provides LG remote enhancements: OSD keymap for Up/Down during playback and voice search via an attached microphone.

extension.summary: Kodi LG – LG remote enhancements for Kodi
extension.description:
Enhances Kodi for LG TV users connected via HDMI-CEC.
Feature 1 – OSD on Up/Down: Remaps the Up and Down navigation buttons during video playback to show the OSD progress bar and pause controls instead of the default 10-minute skip forward/back behaviour.
Feature 2 – Voice Search: Press the configured trigger button (default: Blue colour button) to speak a movie or show name. Audio is captured from a microphone connected to your media player device and sent to Google Speech recognition. The recognised text opens a TMDb Bingie Helper search directly. Note: the LG Magic Remote microphone is handled by LG webOS and cannot be forwarded over HDMI-CEC; a USB microphone plugged into the Ugoos AM6B+ (or similar device) is required.
